findings.description: Testability findings raised by the review — acceptance-criteria verifiability, test seams, observability, edge-case coverage (each an object: id, severity, finding, recommendation).

openItems.description: Blocking/non-blocking open items the owning step must clear (a blocking FAIL halts the relevant gate).

__path.description: Workspace-relative path of the artifact file, injected by the harness.

__kind.description: Artifact-kind discriminator injected by the harness; must equal x-artifact.kind.

__artifact_id.description: Stable artifact id injected by the harness.

__frontmatter_present.description: Harness assertion that YAML frontmatter was found and parsed.

__sections.description: Artifact body sections keyed by their `## ` heading (advisory; additionalProperties permitted).

Subject under review.description: Link / id of what is reviewed; restate the scope.

__body.description: Raw Markdown body, injected by the harness.

id.description: Stable artifact identifier (matches the filename stem).

subject.description: The artifact id or path under review.
